view.title: Fiefdom {hostname}
view.name: Name:
view.noDomainLogFound: The royal archives hold no fiefdom log.
view.allGoodNoErrors: All is well! No scourges in contact information!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome carrier pigeon?
view.welcomeEmailResent: The welcome carrier pigeon has been resent. Check your dovecote.

order.findDomain: Find your fiefdom and check availability.
order.premiumAvailable: Aye! Your fiefdom {domain} is available and it is a premium fiefdom. Automatic registration is disabled. Dispatch carrier pigeon to {email} if you would like to commission this fiefdom for {cost} per year.
order.premiumTaken: Alas! Your fiefdom {domain} is already claimed! You already hold it? You can transfer it, and it is a premium fiefdom. Automatic registration is disabled. Dispatch carrier pigeon to {email} if you would like to commission this fiefdom for {cost} per year.
order.available: Aye! Your fiefdom {domain} is available! You can register it for {cost}. Renewal tribute shall be {renewal}.
order.taken: Alas! Your fiefdom {domain} is already claimed! You already hold it? You can transfer it for {cost}. Renewal tribute shall be {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The tribute shall automatically renew after every year at {cost} until canceled.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are commissioning a tribute product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is tithed to the sealed coin you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the subject portal (Here) select the active service and click the Withdraw link or dispatch carrier pigeon to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Present My Commission below, You also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have read the terms above and I agree.
order.searchingDomain: Patience, good subject! Searching the archives for this fiefdom name.
order.loadingDomainFields: Patience, good subject! Loading fiefdom fields.
order.gotError: By the King's wrath — an error!:

nameservers.title: Fiefdom Keep Name Servers
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Suggested keep name servers have been applied. Click Revise Decree to seal.
nameservers.deleteTitle: Strike keep name server from the record
nameservers.deleteConfirm: You are about to strike your fiefdom keep name server from the record.
nameservers.yesDeleteIt: Aye, Strike it from the Record

eppCode.title: Dispatch EPP Code via Carrier Pigeon
eppCode.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to dispatch the EPP Code to the registered pigeon post address?

whois.title: Whois Privacy
whois.renewalNote: Whois Privacy is renewed every 12 months from the date of activation. Whois Privacy addon renewal tribute is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Whois Privacy is not available for this fiefdom extension.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Whois Privacy is currently granted permission for {hostname}.
whois.disableAndCancel: Revoke Permission and Cancel Whois Privacy
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Privacy conceals the identity of a Registrant when a subject does a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's fiefdom.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of having Contact Privacy is that the Registrant's identity, including home address, messenger number, and pigeon post address, is shielded from scourges, identity thieves and fraudsters.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants grant the Contact Privacy service, masked contact information appears in the public WHOIS registry.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact privacy is available for {cost} per fiefdom per year.
whois.enableNow: To grant Contact Privacy for your Fiefdom, Present Commission Now.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Whois Privacy tribute: {cost} per year. Are you sure you want to present this commission?
whois.enableMessage: Your fiefdom {hostname} has a paid whois privacy addon that is not yet granted permission. Would you like to grant permission now?
whois.whoisEnabled: Whois Privacy has now been granted permission.
whois.disableTitle: Revoke Permission and Cancel Whois Privacy
whois.disableMessage: Your fiefdom {hostname} Whois Privacy addon currently has permission. Are you sure you want to revoke permission and cancel it?
whois.whoisDisabled: Whois Privacy has been revoked and canceled.

whoisToggle.title: Whois Privacy Addon
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Your fiefdom {domain} Whois Privacy addon has Permission Granted
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Your fiefdom {domain} Whois Privacy addon has Permission Revoked
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to Grant Permission for Whois?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to Revoke Permission and Cancel it?

lock.title: Fiefdom Lock/Unlock
lock.activateLock: Do you want to Activate fiefdom lock?
lock.inactivateLock: Do you want to Inactivate fiefdom lock?

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Information
dnssec.noRecords: The royal archives hold no DNSSEC Records.
dnssec.enterDigest: Enter Value of Digest (Must not be greater than {max} Characters)
dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This shall strike all DNSSEC records for this fiefdom from the record.
dnssec.yesRemoveThem: Aye, strike them from the record!
dnssec.removingRecords: Striking DNSSEC records from the record...
dnssec.removeSuccess: DNSSEC records struck from the record successfully!
dnssec.saveSuccess: DNSSEC records sealed with wax successfully!
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Please fill in at least one DNSSEC record.

renew.title: Renew
renew.tip1: Fiefdom should be renewed on or before tenure expiry date.
renew.tip2: If fiefdom tenure expired it may have a grace period from expiry date to renew.
renew.tip3: Grant Permission for Whois Privacy to conceal your Contact Information when a subject does a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's fiefdom.
renew.alreadyRenewed: You have already renewed your fiefdom!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew your fiefdom, kindly render tribute for the existing tax notice.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total tribute: {cost}. Are you sure you want to present this renewal commission?
renew.loadingRenewalInfo: Consulting the Royal Scribes for renewal information...

transfer.notATransfer: This fiefdom is not a transfer.
transfer.loadingTransferStatus: Consulting the Royal Scribes for transfer standing...
